commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/manifests/stage4/model-prefetch.yaml /tmp/model-prefetch.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete job model-prefetch -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found --grace-period=0 --force 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete deploy sglang-baseline -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation -o wide | grep prefetch'
